Name: GRAPHICS_PARAM_ST
Description: Stay Param. Handles various elements relating to in-game graphical effects.

Fields.Name: Decal Spawn Position Offset When a Bullet Hits HIT INS
Fields.Description: Offsets the spawn position of the decal generated when a bullet hits HIT INS, by this amount along the normal direction.

Fields.Name: Torch Emissive Intensity
Fields.Description: The maximum value of the torch's emissive intensity. It reaches this value over the specified number of frames.

Fields.Name: Torch Emissive Intensity Fade Frames
Fields.Description: The fade duration when the torch's emissive intensity changes. 60 frames is equivalent to 1 second.

Fields.Name: Reserved02
Fields.Description: Reserved for future use; currently unused.

Fields.Name: Character Wet Decal Fade Range
Fields.Description: The fade range used to remove decals when the character becomes wet.

Fields.Name: Cloth Gravity in Water (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: The cloth gravity (Y-axis) applied while underwater. For real-world gravity, this would be -9.8.

Fields.Name: Cloth Damping in Water
Fields.Description: The cloth damping applied while underwater.

Fields.Name: Reserved06
Fields.Description: Reserved for future use; currently unused.
